title: Bulk Compost
description: Compost multiple items at the same time.
body:
Composters can now be filled with a single click.

Works for vanilla clients when installed on a server.

Should also work for custom composter recipes.

![Bulk Compost vs Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/36qHeBvD/images/46652a8a4d65cd617c7a153f866dead7ca27a643.gif)
